task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace interface is visible, showing the sidebar and chat area, indicating the agent successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Q2 Marketing' team
task_completion.visual_evidence: A team named 'Q2 Marketing' is visible in the left sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Q2 Marketing' team is private
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q2 Marketing' team in the sidebar has a lock icon next to it, indicating it is a private group/team.

task_completion.description: Verify 'agent.user' was added to the team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'agent.user' is visible in the team's 'Members' list in the right panel, or there is a system message in the 'Q2 Marketing' chat stating that 'agent.user' was added.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'social-media' sub-channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: A channel named 'social-media' is visible in the left sidebar, nested under or associated with the 'Q2 Marketing' team.
The 'social-media' channel has a lock icon next to it in the sidebar or channel header, indicating it is private.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web or desktop GUI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the actual Rocket.Chat application is being used
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Rocket.Chat layout and is not a text editor, mock UI, or notes app containing the target strings.

integrity.description: Verify browser developer tools were not used to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane is not open, and the UI elements appear properly aligned and styled without obvious DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target team name must be exactly 'Q2 Marketing'. The team must be Private (look for a lock icon). The target member added to the team must be exactly 'agent.user'. The sub-channel created within the team must be exactly named 'social-media' and must also be private.
